headline: Is It Time To Reassess Nasdaq (NDAQ) After Multi Year Share Price Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Nasdaq at around US$84 is still a quality opportunity or starting to look fully priced, the current valuation picture offers a few useful clues. The stock has seen a 2.5% decline over the last 7 days, a 2.9% gain over 30 days, and returns of 9.8% over 1 year, 66.0% over 3 years, and 83.5% over 5 years, which can change how investors think about both upside and risk. Recent headlines have focused on Nasdaq's role as both a market operator and a technology...
